title: ADOS Reference Model Bank files
description: Validates the ontology/*.json Reference Model Bank files. Currently UNVALIDATED in the repo. Covers the existing archetypes.json and domains.json plus the three NEW eval facets proposed in docs/REDESIGN-PROPOSAL.md §4 (cognitive_types.json, difficulty.json, verifiability.json). Each bank file shares a governed envelope (version, updated_at, concept_ref, drift_guards) and carries exactly one record array, validated by the matching $def.

version.description: SemVer of the bank; bump on any record change (NFR-Q3).

signals.description: Deterministic hints for the classify.py prior — justify a candidate, do not decide it.

field_contract.description: Archetype-conditioned keys the summarizer must fill in archetype_fields; key -> one-line meaning.

governs.description: What correctness/evidence this domain governs (the materiality anchor).

cognitive_type.description: NEW facet C: the mental operation the task demands (the IQ backbone).

default_verifiability.description: Typical ground-truth class for tasks of this type.

difficulty_tier.description: NEW facet D: anchored difficulty tier; sum of four 0-3 sub-axes (steps, specialisation, ambiguity, context_load).

weight.description: Difficulty weight used in difficulty-weighted IQ (T1=1..T4=4).

score_range.description: [min, max] inclusive of the summed 0-12 difficulty score mapping to this tier.

verifiability_class.description: NEW facet E: whether an item even has a checkable answer; protects the IQ metric.

scoring.description: How an answer is judged (deterministic check / rubric / preference).

counts_toward_iq.description: false for 'subjective' — reported as pref%, excluded from the IQ number.
